sentences.arabic: تَأَخَّرَ أَدْهَمُ عَنِ الْعَمَلِ بِسَبَبِ الزِّحَامِ فِي الطَّرِيقِ.
sentences.translation: Adhem je zakasnio na posao zbog gužve na putu.
sentences.translationEn: Adham was late to work because of traffic on the road.

sentences.translation: Nazvao je direktora i obavijestio ga o razlogu.
sentences.translationEn: He called his manager and told him the reason.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ الْمُدِيرُ لَا مُشْكِلَةَ وَطَلَبَ مِنْهُ الْحُضُورَ بِسُرْعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Direktor je rekao nema problema i zamolio ga da dođe brzo.
sentences.translationEn: The manager said no problem and asked him to come quickly.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ أَدْهَمُ وَعَمِلَ بِجُهْدٍ لِيُعَوِّضَ الْوَقْتَ الضَّائِعَ.
sentences.translation: Adhem je stigao i marljivo radio da nadoknadi izgubljeno vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: Adham arrived and worked hard to make up for the lost time.
